functions.name: addAzureVirtualNetwork
functions.description: Adds an Azure Virtual Network resource to the application model.

functions.name: addNatGateway
functions.description: Adds an Azure NAT Gateway resource to the application model.
functions.remarks:
The NAT Gateway is created with Standard SKU. If no Public IP Address is explicitly associated
via `WithPublicIPAddress`, a Public IP Address is automatically created in the
NAT Gateway's bicep module with Standard SKU and Static allocation.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Azure NAT Gateway resource.

functions.name: addNetworkSecurityGroup
functions.description: Adds an Azure Network Security Group to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Network Security Group resource.

functions.name: addNetworkSecurityPerimeter
functions.description: Adds an Azure Network Security Perimeter to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Network Security Perimeter resource.

functions.name: addPrivateEndpoint
functions.description: Adds an Azure Private Endpoint resource to the subnet.
functions.remarks:
This method automatically creates the Private DNS Zone, VNet Link, and DNS Zone Group
required for private endpoint DNS resolution. Private DNS Zones are shared across
multiple private endpoints that use the same zone name.
When a private endpoint is added, the target resource (or its parent) is automatically
configured to deny public network access. To override this behavior, use
`ConfigureInfrastructure``1` to customize
the network settings.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target Azure resource to connect via private link.

functions.name: addPublicIPAddress
functions.description: Adds an Azure Public IP Address resource to the application model.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the Azure Public IP Address resource.

functions.name: addSubnet
functions.description: Adds an Azure subnet resource to an Azure Virtual Network resource.
functions.signature: addSubnet(name: string, addressPrefix: ParameterResource, subnetName?: string): AzureSubnetResource

functions.name: allowInbound
functions.description: Adds an inbound allow rule to the subnet's Network Security Group.
functions.remarks: If no Network Security Group has been associated with the subnet, one is automatically created.
functions.signature: allowInbound(port?: string, from?: string, to?: string, protocol?: SecurityRuleProtocol, priority?: number, name?: string): AzureSubnetResource

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The destination port range (e.g., "443", "80-443"). Defaults to "*" (any).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The source address prefix (e.g., "AzureLoadBalancer", "Internet", "10.0.0.0/8"). Defaults to "*" (any).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination address prefix. Defaults to "*" (any).

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: The network protocol. Defaults to `Asterisk` (any).

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: The rule priority (100-4096). If not specified, auto-increments from 100 by 100.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The rule name. If not specified, auto-generated from parameters.

functions.name: allowOutbound
functions.description: Adds an outbound allow rule to the subnet's Network Security Group.
functions.remarks: If no Network Security Group has been associated with the subnet, one is automatically created.
functions.signature: allowOutbound(port?: string, from?: string, to?: string, protocol?: SecurityRuleProtocol, priority?: number, name?: string): AzureSubnetResource

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The destination port range (e.g., "443", "80-443"). Defaults to "*" (any).

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The source address prefix. Defaults to "*" (any).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The destination address prefix (e.g., "Internet", "VirtualNetwork"). Defaults to "*" (any).

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: The network protocol. Defaults to `Asterisk` (any).

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: The rule priority (100-4096). If not specified, auto-increments from 100 by 100.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The rule name. If not specified, auto-generated from parameters.

functions.name: withAccessRule
functions.description: Adds an access rule to the Network Security Perimeter.

parameters.name: rule
parameters.description: The access rule configuration.

functions.name: withDelegatedSubnet
functions.description: Configures the resource to use the specified subnet with appropriate service delegation.
functions.remarks:
This method automatically configures the subnet with the appropriate service delegation
for the target resource type (e.g., "Microsoft.App/environments" for Azure Container Apps).

parameters.name: subnet
parameters.description: The subnet to associate with the resource.

functions.name: withNatGateway
functions.description: Associates a NAT Gateway with the subnet.
functions.remarks:
A NAT Gateway provides outbound internet connectivity for resources in the subnet.
A subnet can have at most one NAT Gateway.

parameters.name: natGateway
parameters.description: The NAT Gateway to associate with the subnet.

functions.name: withNetworkSecurityGroup
functions.description: Associates a Network Security Group with the subnet.

parameters.name: nsg
parameters.description: The Network Security Group to associate with the subnet.

functions.name: withNetworkSecurityPerimeter
functions.description: Associates an Azure PaaS resource with a Network Security Perimeter.
functions.remarks:
In `Enforced` mode, resources within the
perimeter can communicate with each other, but public access is restricted to the rules defined
in the perimeter profile.
In `Learning` mode, traffic that would
be blocked by the perimeter rules is logged but not denied. This is useful when onboarding
resources to identify required access rules before switching to enforced mode.
functions.returns: A reference to the target resource builder for chaining.
functions.signature: withNetworkSecurityPerimeter(nsp: AzureNetworkSecurityPerimeterResource, accessMode?: NetworkSecurityPerimeterAssociationAccessMode, associationName?: string): IResource

parameters.name: nsp
parameters.description: The Network Security Perimeter to associate with.

parameters.name: accessMode
parameters.description: The access mode for the association. Defaults to `Enforced`. Use `Learning` to log violations without blocking traffic.

parameters.name: associationName
parameters.description: An optional name for the association. If not provided, defaults to `"{resourceName}-assoc"`.

functions.name: withPublicIPAddress
functions.description: Associates an explicit Public IP Address resource with the NAT Gateway.
functions.remarks: When an explicit Public IP Address is provided, the NAT Gateway will not auto-create one.

parameters.name: publicIPAddress
parameters.description: The Public IP Address resource to associate.

parameters.name: rule
parameters.description: The security rule configuration.

dtoTypes.name: AzureNspAccessRule
dtoTypes.description: Represents an access rule configuration for an Azure Network Security Perimeter.
dtoTypes.remarks:
Access rules control how traffic flows into and out of the network security perimeter.
Inbound rules specify which external sources (IP ranges or subscriptions) can access
resources within the perimeter. Outbound rules specify which external destinations (FQDNs)
resources within the perimeter can communicate with.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Gets or sets the name of the access rule. This name must be unique within the perimeter profile.

fields.name: Direction
fields.description: Gets or sets the direction of the rule.

fields.name: AddressPrefixes
fields.description: Gets or initializes the list of inbound address prefixes (CIDR ranges) allowed by this rule.

fields.name: AddressPrefixReferences
fields.description: Gets or initializes the list of inbound address prefixes (CIDR ranges) `ReferenceExpression` values allowed by this rule.

fields.name: Subscriptions
fields.description: Gets or initializes the list of subscription IDs allowed by this rule.

fields.name: SubscriptionReferences
fields.description: Gets or initializes the subscription resource ID `ReferenceExpression` values allowed by this rule.

fields.name: FullyQualifiedDomainNames
fields.description: Gets or initializes the list of fully qualified domain names (FQDNs) allowed by this rule.

fields.name: FullyQualifiedDomainNameReferences
fields.description: Gets or initializes the fully qualified domain name `ReferenceExpression` values allowed by this rule.

dtoTypes.name: AzureSecurityRule
dtoTypes.description: Represents a security rule configuration for an Azure Network Security Group.
dtoTypes.remarks:
Security rules control inbound and outbound network traffic for subnets associated with the Network Security Group.
Rules are evaluated in priority order, with lower numbers having higher priority.

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Gets or sets the name of the security rule. This name must be unique within the Network Security Group.

fields.name: Description
fields.description: Gets or sets an optional description for the security rule.

fields.name: Priority
fields.description: Gets or sets the priority of the rule. Valid values are between 100 and 4096. Lower numbers have higher priority.

fields.name: Direction
fields.description: Gets or sets the direction of the rule.

fields.name: Access
fields.description: Gets or sets whether network traffic is allowed or denied.

fields.name: Protocol
fields.description: Gets or sets the network protocol this rule applies to.

fields.name: SourceAddressPrefix
fields.description: Gets or sets the source address prefix. Defaults to "*" (any).

fields.name: SourceAddressPrefixReference
fields.description: Gets or sets a `ReferenceExpression` whose value is resolved at deploy time and used as the source address prefix for the rule. Takes precedence over `SourceAddressPrefix`.

fields.name: SourcePortRange
fields.description: Gets or sets the source port range. Defaults to "*" (any).

fields.name: DestinationAddressPrefix
fields.description: Gets or sets the destination address prefix. Defaults to "*" (any).

fields.name: DestinationAddressPrefixReference
fields.description: Gets or sets a `ReferenceExpression` whose value is resolved at deploy time and used as the destination address prefix for the rule. Takes precedence over `DestinationAddressPrefix`.

fields.name: DestinationPortRange
fields.description: Gets or sets the destination port range. Use "*" for any, or a range like "80-443".
